topics.name: Osmosis
content: - Osmosis is the movement of water across a semi-permeable membrane
- Important for plant and animal cells

quiz.question: What is osmosis?
options: Movement of water from high to low concentration
Movement of solute from low to high concentration
Movement of water from low to high concentration
quiz.answer: Movement of water from high to low concentration
quiz.hint: Water moves through a semi-permeable membrane from high to low water concentration.

quiz.question: Which cells are affected by osmosis?
quiz.hint: Osmosis occurs in all cells with a semi-permeable membrane.
